blended.narrative: White Pass is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 21 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,660 ft. Looking ahead, 27 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 20" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: light rain showers, highs of 42°F.
Thursday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 49.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 26" over the past week. Current depth: 78".
